vocab.example: Watching the germination process of a simple bean seed in a glass jar was my first real introduction to biology.
My mother encouraged me to look after some ornamental plants on the windowsill to teach me responsibility.

vocab.meaning: niềm say mê thực vật học
vocab.example: My childhood botanical enthusiasm was sparked by a school project where we had to grow marigolds from scratch.
I remember my father showing me how foliar feeding worked by misting the leaves with a nutrient solution.

vocab.meaning: héo chết, lụi tàn (thường do điều kiện khắc nghiệt)
vocab.example: Unfortunately, many of my early attempts at gardening would perish during the scorching summer heatwaves.
I was captivated by the vibrant petals of the morning glories that climbed up our garden fence every July.

vocab.meaning: trau dồi kỹ năng/khiếu làm vườn
vocab.example: It took years of trial and error for me to truly cultivate a green thumb and keep a plant alive for more than a month.
As a beginner, I was advised to start with a hardy species like Aloe Vera, which requires very little maintenance.

vocab.meaning: nghẹt rễ (khi rễ phát triển quá lớn so với chậu)
vocab.example: I didn't realize my spider plant had become root bound until it stopped growing and started turning yellow.

vocab.meaning: sự kiên cường của tự nhiên
vocab.example: Seeing a tiny sprout push through a crack in the pavement gave me a profound respect for nature's resilience.
